issues.title: Use efficient cache lifetimes
issues.description: A long cache lifetime can speed up repeat visits to your page.

issues.title: Improve image delivery
issues.description: Reducing the download time of images can improve the perceived load time of the page and LCP.

items.reason: This image file is larger than it needs to be (720x1457) for its displayed dimensions (240x486). Use responsive images to reduce the image download size.

issues.title: Serve static assets with an efficient cache policy
issues.description: A long cache lifetime can speed up repeat visits to your page.

issues.title: Max Potential First Input Delay
issues.description: The maximum potential First Input Delay that your users could experience is the duration of the longest task.

issues.title: First Contentful Paint
issues.description: First Contentful Paint marks the time at which the first text or image is painted.

issues.title: Speed Index
issues.description: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.
